Wildwood · U.S. circuit

Realism Tattoo Artist in Wildwood — Giuseppe Bonelli

Looking for a realism tattoo artist in Wildwood, New Jersey? Giuseppe Bonelli — the Italian hyper-realism specialist whose black & grey and color work is worn by footballers Lautaro Martínez, Gianluigi Donnarumma and Alessio Romagnoli — tours the U.S. tattoo-convention circuit year-round, including Villain Arts festival cities like Wildwood (convention weekend: August 7–9, 2026). His confirmed Summer 2026 stops are Portland, New Hampshire, Houston, Virginia Beach, Nashville and Jacksonville — join the Wildwood list below and you'll be contacted first when a Wildwood date is confirmed.

Request a consultation
The work

Selected wildwood · u.s. circuit pieces

Get on the Wildwood list

Send your idea now: when Giuseppe confirms a Wildwood date you're contacted first, before slots open publicly. Larger projects can also start at another tour stop.

What you can book

Black & grey realism, color realism, wildlife and portrait pieces sized for a convention session — every piece custom, one-to-one.

The venue & boardwalk

Villain Arts takes over the Wildwoods Convention Center at 4501 Boardwalk, right on the Wildwoods' two-mile boardwalk of classic Doo Wop motels and Morey's Piers. It's long-running — locals know it as the Wildwood Tattoo Beach Bash — and it sits in a town that already has a boardwalk tattoo scene (Love Rock Tattoo, Oxygen), so convention weekend runs alongside shops that tattoo year-round just blocks away.

FAQ

Good to know

Is Giuseppe Bonelli tattooing in Wildwood?

Giuseppe tours U.S. tattoo conventions year-round. His confirmed Summer 2026 stops are Portland, New Hampshire, Houston, Virginia Beach, Nashville and Jacksonville; Wildwood dates are announced to the waiting list first — join it via the form on this page.

When is the Wildwood tattoo convention?

Wildwood's Villain Arts convention weekend is August 7–9, 2026. Giuseppe's own appearance dates are confirmed separately — join the list to be notified.

How much does a realism tattoo cost?

Pricing depends on size, placement and detail. Full-day realism sessions in the U.S. typically start around $1,200–$1,800; an exact quote follows once Giuseppe sees your idea and reference.

Do you require a deposit?

Yes — a non-refundable deposit confirms your appointment and is applied to the final cost. It's forfeited for no-shows or cancellations with less than 72 hours' notice.

How do I book?

Use the form on this page with your idea, placement and a reference image. Giuseppe reviews every request personally and replies within 3–5 days with available dates.

Join the Wildwood list

Tell Giuseppe about your idea — he replies personally within 3–5 days.
By sending you agree to be contacted about your tattoo request. No spam.
